title: The iOS app is here!
description: You can now download the beta version of JointSettle Mobile on your iPhone! Download it from the App Store and test it out.

title: How much does JointSettle cost?
description: A new blog post covering JointSettle's hosting costs, usage trends, and how much people donate.

title: JointSettle is now available in eight languages!
description: French, German, Spanish, and more! Read about it in our new blog post.

title: Hash-Based Authentication
description: JointSettle now uses a simple hash-based identity system. Generate a unique 8-character hash to create and manage groups — no email or password needed.

title: Expanded Categories (100+)
description: Replaced the old category system with 100+ categories across 12 groupings including Housing, Transportation, Food & Dining, Shopping, Entertainment, Travel, Healthcare, Education, and more.

title: Vercel Deployment Fix
description: Fixed Prisma database connection issues and streamlined the Vercel build process. Database schema is now synced automatically on deploy.

title: Group Sharing Fix
description: Fixed an issue where invited users got 'Group not found'. Any authenticated user with a valid hash can now view and contribute to a shared group.

title: Prisma Client Fix
description: Resolved a critical runtime error where the Prisma database client was undefined, causing all database operations to fail.

title: Stats & Charts Dashboard
description: Added interactive pie charts and bar charts showing group spending breakdowns, powered by Recharts.

title: Recurring Expenses
description: Support for daily, weekly, and monthly recurring expenses with automatic date scheduling.

title: Activity Log
description: Full audit trail showing all group activity including expense creation, updates, and deletions.

title: Multi-Currency Support
description: Added live exchange rate conversion for 170+ currencies. Expenses can be recorded in one currency and converted to the group currency.

title: AI Receipt Scanning
description: Upload receipt images and auto-fill expense details using AI-powered OCR. (Beta)

title: PWA Support
description: JointSettle can now be installed as a Progressive Web App on any device.

title: i18n — 23 Languages
description: Added internationalization support for 23+ languages including French, Spanish, German, Japanese, and more.

title: JSON & CSV Export
description: Export all group expenses as JSON or CSV files for external analysis.

title: Smart Split Modes
description: Split expenses evenly, by shares, by percentage, or by custom amounts.

title: Optimized Reimbursements
description: Get settlement suggestions that minimize the number of money transfers between participants.

title: Initial Launch
description: JointSettle launched as a minimalist expense-sharing app with groups, expenses, and basic balance calculations.
